title: Remove SGO from sportsbook catalog + label consensus offers

live_db_evidence.description: Confirmed via Supabase MCP: SELECT active FROM sportsbooks WHERE id='sgo' returns false. provider_book_aliases for sgo:sgo deleted. Catalog endpoint only returns active=true sportsbooks.

runtime_change_note: The runtime-repositories.ts change is cosmetic: null-bookmaker SGO offer sportsbookName maps to 'Consensus' string. No pick lifecycle, no submission path, no atomic RPCs changed. Migration deactivates a catalog row (active=false), preserving all FK references.
